reasoning_model_1: Model 1 demonstrates perfect Content Accuracy, reciting the script '我相信自己能胜任这份工作，我会全力以赴' exactly as requested without any omissions or additions. In terms of Fluency and Naturalness, the speech is smooth, with natural breathing patterns and appropriate pacing (e.g., the slight pause after the comma). Regarding Paralinguistic Compliance (Cognitive State - Confidence), the audio effectively conveys a 'Confident tone'. The speaker uses a firm, steady pitch and places emphasis on key words like '相信' (believe) and '全力以赴' (go all out), sounding professional, assured, and sincere. The tone is convincing without being exaggerated.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 fails the Content Accuracy criterion significantly. While the user command requested the specific text '我相信自己能胜任这份工作，我会全力以赴', the model added an extra four-character phrase '不负期待' at the end of the audio. Additionally, the phrasing includes an unnatural pause between '自己' and '能胜任' (around 1s), which disrupts the grammatical flow of the sentence. While the Paralinguistic Compliance is technically met—the voice is loud, energetic, and definitely sounds confident (perhaps overly so, bordering on shouting)—the failure to adhere strictly to the requested text script constitutes a major flaw.
model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner. It strictly adhered to the text constraint while delivering a natural, professional, and confident tone that fits the context of an interview or declaration perfectly. Model 2, while expressive and confident, failed the fundamental instruction of text adherence by hallucinating an additional phrase ('不负期待') and exhibited slightly disjointed prosody with unnecessary pauses. Model 1 balances accuracy, naturalness, and emotional expression flawlessly, whereas Model 2's content addition penalizes its score significantly.
